headings.text: Energizing Control: Savant’s Leap into the Future of Smart Home Automation
Energizing Control: Savant’s Leap into the Future of Smart Home Automation

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to design a system for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingEnergizing Control: Savant’s Leap into the Future of Smart Home AutomationPosted on November 22, 2023Energizing Control: Savant’s Leap into the Future of Smart Home AutomationIn a world where technological advancements are constantly redefining our everyday lives, Savant Systems LLC stands at the forefront of innovation in the home automation industry.As a certified dealer and installer of Savant products in the Coachella Valley, AVIR is excited to delve into Savant’s recent announcements that mark a significant stride towards integrating audio, energy consumption control, and lighting into the smart home ecosystem. This story explores Savant’s latest offerings and their implications for a more connected and efficient future.Savant’s Smart PDU family‍‍Savant’s Smart Power Box Family: A New Era in Energy ManagementThe introduction of Savant’s Smart Power Distribution Units (PDU) and Smart Uninterruptible Power Supplies (UPS) is a game-changer in energy management. These products blend the convenience of smart home functionality with advanced power control. The Savant Power Box 8 and Power Box 3, with their individual addressable outlets and built-in surge protection, not only offer comprehensive energy monitoring but also enhance homeowner insights. Set to be available in early 2024, these Smart PDUs promise a future where energy efficiency is seamlessly integrated into our daily lives.Savant Systems are now compatible with Siri control devices.‍‍Siri Integrations: Elevating Voice Control in the Savant EcosystemSavant’s integration with Apple’s Siri represents a significant leap in voice-controlled automation. This collaboration allows users to enjoy natural language voice recognition and control over their entire home environment. From triggering Savant Scenes to controlling the Cync platform, Siri integration brings a new dimension of convenience and accessibility to the Savant system. This move not only bridges the gap between DIY and professional smart home setups but also opens doors to a more intuitive and connected living experience.‍Savant power control app‍A Smart Home Starts with Smart PowerUnderstanding and controlling energy usage is the backbone of a true smart home. Savant’s powerful energy management tools, accessible through its user-friendly app, provide real-time and historical insights into energy consumption. With features like Energy Modes, Circuit Control, and Storm Watch, homeowners can proactively manage their energy use, ensuring efficiency and preparedness for any situation.‍Savant music app‍Filling Homes with Music: The Evolution of Audio ExperienceSavant’s advancements in audio technology redefine the way we interact with music at home. The enhanced Savant Music experience, with its personalized dashboard and the ability to create playlists across multiple services, offers a unique, immersive audio experience. Integration with services like Apple Music and Spotify Connect further enriches this experience, making Savant a leader in providing professional-quality audio in personalized settings.‍‍The Savant Power System: Redefining Smart Energy ManagementThe Savant Power System exemplifies the future of smart energy management. From monitoring and controlling circuits at the distribution panel to managing backup power sources, this system ensures that every aspect of home energy is smart and efficient. The integration of components like Savant Power Modules, Hybrid Inverter, and Level 2 EV Charger, managed by Savant’s advanced software, delivers an unparalleled energy management experience.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to design a system for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:‍Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.com‍Ask for Yasin or Charley.‍‍‍‍More details about the Savant Power System below:‍THE SAVANT POWER SYSTEMThe Ultimate Energy Management Solution‍POWERFUL, SIMPLE, SCALABLESavant Power System delivers the ultimate solution for smart energy management. Monitor production and usage trends, control circuits at the distribution panel, and manage solar, battery, or generator backup sources all via the award winning Savant App. Our systems scale to meet the needs of any site from single family homes to large installations. Offset peak utility rates, keep stored power flowing to where it’s needed during grid outages, and optimize overall energy usage - contributing to a more sustainable future for all.‍1. Savant Power Storage, 2. Electrical Panel with Savant Power Modules, 3. Savant Level 2 EV Charger‍Compact, elegant, and efficient. The Savant Power System uses some or all of just a few key components: Savant Power Modules, Savant’s Hybrid Inverter, Savant Storage, and Savant’s Level 2 EV Charger. From small systems to large installations, with these key elements working together in harmony and managed by Savant’s advanced automation software we can deliver smart energy that’s truly ahead of the class.‍ELECTRIFY YOUR LIFESee how the Savant Power System helps to manage a variety of power resources, including solar, battery and back-up generator power. Experience reduced dependency on the power grid and seamless power management during an unplanned grid outage.‍‍IT STARTS AT THE PANELAffordable, modular and compatible with all major electrical panels, Savant's Power Modules deliver precise energy monitoring and instant outage detection. If your home has an automatic generator or battery storage, Savant Power Modules allow you to tailor the circuits being powered during a grid outage, because the real critical loads are the ones you need right now.‍‍‍BRING IN SOME STORAGEBack up your home power with robust and reliable solar inverter and battery storage solutions from Savant. Capable of handling the energy needs of any job, from partial to whole home backup, all the way up to 800A services with as much as 160kWh of battery capacity.‍‍SMART CHARGINGStunning and powerful, the Savant Level 2 EV Charger is beautifully designed, rain tight, and feature rich. Convenient and rapid at-home charging for your electric vehicle that also lets you monitor energy consumption trends, manage power, and more right from the Savant app.‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
